Small ingredient. Essential role.

THE DEFENSE THAT COMPOUNDS

Stimulant use puts demands on your body's antioxidant systems. Mustard seed activates sulforaphane production — your body's built-in defense against the resulting oxidative stress.
SEE WHAT'S INSIDE STASIS

MUSTARD SEED HAS A JOB TO DO

Stasis Day includes 50mg of Mustard Seed because it contains the enzyme myrosinase.

Myrosinase converts glucoraphanin (from broccoli seed) into sulforaphane.

Without myrosinase, that conversion is limited. With it, your body can actually produce sulforaphane efficiently.
GET THE ACTIVATED FORMULA
STASIS + STIMULANT

BALANCE FOR BOLD MINDS

SHOP NOW
